title: Taylors Eye Witness Syracuse Ash Knife Block - Solid Wood Supplied Empty to Hold Five Knives, Chef, Bread, Carving, Paring & Vegetable Knife. Neutral Colour to Match Your Knife Handles
features: ✅ CONTEMPORARY SYRACUSE DESIGN: Taylors Eye Witness have been designing and creating knives for over 150 years. This experience is shown in the handmade craftsmanship of this range of knives & blocks. This block would suit both contemporary dining and traditional farmhouse kitchens alike and would be a talking point with family, friends and dinner guests.
✅ SOLID ASH: Do your culinary and gourmet skills justice with a beautiful block made of solid Ash wood and fill it with a choice of coloured knives from the Syracuse range by Taylor's Eye Witness.

✅ 25 YEAR GUARANTEE: At Taylor's Eye Witness, we are so proud of our products that we guarantee the tools in the Syracuse Range for 25 Years. If in the unlikely event that your block becomes defective under normal kitchen use and following care instructions provided, it will be repaired or replaced without charge. Hand wash recommended to extend the blocks life.
description: Syracuse by Taylors Eye Witness Ash Wooden Block designed to hold the following knives: 20cm/8” Chef’s Knife 20cm/8” Bread Knife 20cm/8” Carving Knife 13cm/5” All Purpose Knife 9cm/3.5” Paring Knife If you are looking for a professional, restaurant quality, long-lasting and uber stylish universal knife block, then you've certainly found it. Taylors Eye Witness is a 150 year old company, which was founded in the early years of the 19th Century as designers and producers of kitchen knives, pocket knives, scissors and sharpeners. The “Eye Witness” Trademark was first registered in 1838 – the inspiration for the choice of “Eye Witness” is believed to be Shakespeare’s line in Henry IV – “No eye hath seen better”. Employing highly skilled Sheffield craftsmen and with a knowledge base which is unrivalled, Taylors Eye Witness have stood the test of time through an unrelenting dedication to quality, service and good old fashioned technical know-how.
